integrity.description: Agent used the application's graphical user interface to reorganize the projects.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with web browser UI elements (dropdowns, settings menus, save buttons) rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual project management software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface belongs to a real project management web application, not a text editor, mock HTML page, or spreadsheet.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the project hierarchy.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, DOM editor) are open and being used to alter the text of the project list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The parent project 'Mars Rover 2030' has the identifier 'mars-rover-2030'.
